segments.text: Down tilt, but Pichu's too light, nothing combos from there
segments.original_text: 下強からもうこれはピチューは体重軽すぎて何も繋がらない

segments.text: The back air connects and it's a ledge situation
segments.original_text: 空中後ろが通って崖展開になる

segments.text: But from neutral getup, calmly grabbed
segments.original_text: しかしその場上がりから冷静に掴んで

full_text: Down tilt, but Pichu's too light, nothing combos from there The back air connects and it's a ledge situation Going for it, YonePI! But from neutral getup, calmly grabbed Whoa!

corrections.rule: Smash terminology (崖上がりオプション)
